data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'ETA updates', but the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this requirement. While the use case mentions that ETA updates occur automatically in case of traffic delays, there is no direct evidence or specific implementation details provided to substantiate this functionality. This lack of explicit data or endpoints related to ETA updates results in a clear gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of API reads or persisted state checks confirming the implementation of ETA updates.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the ETA updates requirement.
